public_claim_value: Machine-readable official EU record confirms grant agreement ID 101225611, acronym ORION, project title, status SIGNED, ecSignatureDate 2025-07-16, start date 2025-09-01, end date 2028-08-31, lastUpdateDate 2026-05-25 13:31:12, and EUR 5,240,093.75 EU contribution.
cautious_finding: This adds a reproducible structured official companion inside the already captured Slovenian police plus CORDIS chain, but it does not raise the row beyond bounded project/governance claims or prove deployment, procurement, legality, effectiveness, or independent compliance.
observatory_hook: Machine-readable companion ingest for authority-depth dashboard, provenance/hash legend, and public-sector disclosure metadata panel.

public_claim_value: The XML organization nodes list public-authority participant names including SISAMINISTERIO (SM) / MINISTRY OF THE INTERIOR, MINISTRSTVO ZA NOTRANJE ZADEVE / MINISTRY OF THE INTERIOR, GLAVNA DIREKTSIA GRANICHNA POLITSIA / GENERAL DIRECTORATE BORDER POLICE, and INSPECTORATUL TERITORIAL AL POLITIEI DE FRONTIERA IASI / TERRITORIAL BORDER POLICE INSPECTORATES.
cautious_finding: The XML preserves participant-chain metadata in structured form and is useful for graph/table reuse, but the row remains a bounded public-sector governance companion rather than an enforcement, procurement-award, audit, or court-facing document chain.
observatory_hook: Participant-topology extraction for policing/border-control graph edges and multilingual public-authority chain panels.
